data.title: Oncolytics Biotech Showcases Pelareorep as Immune-Priming Backbone With New AACR 2026 Data
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Oncolytics Biotech ( (ONCY) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Oncolytics Biotech will present new mechanistic and translational data at the AACR 2026 meeting showing that its lead candidate pelareorep acts as an immune-priming backbone, activating both innate and adaptive immunity and fostering tertiary lymphoid structure formation in tumors. These findings position pelareorep as a potential foundation for combination regimens with checkpoint inhibitors, targeted therapies, chemotherapy and other immuno-oncology agents across multiple tumor types.

New biomarker results from the Phase 1/2 GOBLET trial in metastatic pancreatic cancer indicate that pelareorep combined with atezolizumab and chemotherapy can convert tumors to a more immune-active state, with an immune activation signature at four weeks correlating with longer progression-free survival and previously reported response rates more than double historical chemotherapy benchmarks. Complementary data from the AWARE-1 breast cancer study show pelareorep can generate coordinated anti-tumor immune responses and tertiary lymphoid structures, suggesting it may sensitize immunologically cold or checkpoint-inhibitor–refractory tumors, including RAS-mutated cancers, thereby strengthening Oncolytics’ case for pelareorep as a versatile immune-priming strategy with broad clinical and commercial potential.

The most recent analyst rating on (ONCY) stock is a Buy with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Oncolytics Biotech stock, see the ONCY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ONCY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ONCY is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, sizable losses, heavy cash burn, and a sharply reduced equity base that raises financing risk). Technicals are a near-term positive with price above major moving averages and positive momentum indicators, while valuation remains difficult to support due to the negative P/E and lack of dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on ONCY stock, click here.

More about Oncolytics Biotech

Oncolytics Biotech Inc. is a clinical-stage immunotherapy company focused on developing pelareorep, an investigational, systemically delivered viral therapy designed to prime anti-tumor immune responses. The company targets difficult-to-treat solid tumors, including breast and gastrointestinal cancers, with an emphasis on RAS-driven malignancies such as pancreatic and colorectal cancer.

Average Trading Volume: 1,343,466

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $103.4M

data.title: CBL & Associates Announces New $425 Million Loan
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

CBL & Associates Properties ( (CBL) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 13, 2026, CBL & Associates’ operating partnership and certain subsidiaries entered into a new $425 million non-recourse loan with Goldman Sachs Bank USA, secured by a pool of primarily mall properties that had previously collateralized a $634 million secured term loan. The five-year facility, maturing in April 2031 with a fixed 7.40% interest rate, was used to retire a portion of the existing $634 million term loan and carries a minimum debt-yield covenant, other customary covenants and default provisions, prepayment flexibility in the year before maturity, and standard acceleration triggers, forming part of a broader refinancing of the company’s term debt announced the same day.

The most recent analyst rating on (CBL) stock is a Hold with a $40.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CBL & Associates Properties stock, see the CBL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CBL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CBL is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by below-average financial resilience—high leverage, weakened 2025 cash flow, and a major gross margin disruption—despite a clear earnings recovery. Technicals are neutral-to-mildly constructive (above longer-term moving averages), and valuation is a key positive with a low P/E and high dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on CBL stock, click here.

More about CBL & Associates Properties

CBL & Associates Properties, Inc., through its majority-owned operating partnership, is a real estate investment trust focused on owning and operating primarily mall properties across multiple U.S. markets. The company’s portfolio includes regional shopping centers such as Cherryvale Mall in Illinois, Hanes Mall in North Carolina, and various malls in Texas, Pennsylvania, Virginia, Wisconsin, Mississippi, North Dakota, and Wyoming.

Average Trading Volume: 149,290

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.16B

data.title: Young & Co.’s Brewery Discloses Family Share Transfers by Non-Executive Director
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Young & Co’S Brewery ( (GB:YNGA) ) has issued an announcement.

Young & Co.’s Brewery reported that non-executive director Torquil Sligo-Young has transferred 8,000 A ordinary shares and 10,000 non-voting ordinary shares as a gift to family members, at nil consideration, with the transactions executed outside a trading venue on 19 March 2026. Part of this transfer involves his daughter, Isla Mary Clare Sligo-Young, who has been notified as a person closely associated, underscoring routine family share reallocation rather than a market sale, with no indication of immediate impact on the company’s operations or broader shareholder base.

The company also filed the corresponding regulatory notifications for both Torquil and Isla Sligo-Young, detailing the volumes and types of shares involved in compliance with market disclosure rules. These disclosures highlight ongoing transparency around director and related-party holdings, which may be of interest to investors tracking governance, control dynamics, and the distribution of voting and non-voting equity within the long-established brewery group.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:YNGA) stock is a Hold with a £884.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Young & Co’S Brewery stock, see the GB:YNGA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on YNGA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, YNGA is a Neutral.

Young & Co’s Brewery demonstrates strong financial health and strategic initiatives to enhance shareholder value through share buybacks. However, technical indicators suggest bearish momentum, and the high P/E ratio indicates potential overvaluation. The attractive dividend yield provides some balance to the valuation concerns.

The company’s capital structure includes both A ordinary shares and non-voting ordinary shares, reflecting a traditional, family-influenced ownership base within the listed pub and brewing sector.

Associated British Foods ( (GB:ABF) ) has shared an announcement.

Associated British Foods has repurchased 149,999 ordinary shares for cancellation as part of its ongoing share buyback programme authorised by shareholders. The shares were acquired on 19 March 2026 at an average price of 1,824.0622 pence, via on-exchange transactions executed by Barclays across several UK and European trading venues.

Cancelling the stock will reduce the company’s share count and can enhance earnings per share, signalling continued balance-sheet strength and capital discipline. The move underscores management’s confidence in the group’s financial position and returns policy, and is likely to be welcomed by shareholders seeking ongoing capital returns in addition to dividends.

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

North American Construction Group ( (TSE:NOA) ) just unveiled an update.

North American Construction Group Ltd. has filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission dated March 19, 2026, confirming its status as a foreign private issuer reporting under Form 40-F. The filing was signed by President and Chief Executive Officer Barry Palmer, underscoring the company’s ongoing compliance with U.S. disclosure requirements.

The company announced that its Annual General and Special Meeting of security holders will take place on May 20, 2026, in Acheson, Alberta, with April 13, 2026 set as the record date for notice, voting, and beneficial ownership determination. The notice also confirms that proxy-related materials will be sent directly to non-objecting beneficial owners and that the issuer will pay for delivery to objecting beneficial owners, outlining key logistics for shareholders holding common shares under CUSIP 656811106 and ISIN CA6568111067.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:NOA) stock is a Buy with a C$20.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on North American Construction Group stock, see the TSE:NOA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NOA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NOA is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weakening financial quality (margin compression, high leverage, and negative free cash flow) and a strong bearish technical setup (price below major moving averages with weak momentum). Valuation and dividend yield offer some offset but are not enough to outweigh the fundamental and trend risks.

To see Spark’s full report on NOA stock, click here.

More about North American Construction Group

North American Construction Group Ltd. is a Canadian heavy construction and mining services contractor based in Acheson, Alberta, serving resource and industrial projects across North America. The company’s shares are listed on the New York Stock Exchange, and it regularly reports as a foreign private issuer under the U.S. Securities Exchange Act.

data.title: Tri-Continental Schedules 96th Annual Stockholders Meeting
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Tri-Continental Corp ( (TY) ) is now available.

On March 19, 2026, Tri-Continental Corporation’s board announced that the company’s 96th Annual Meeting of Stockholders is scheduled for June 16, 2026, in Minneapolis, Minnesota. The board set April 21, 2026, as the record date for determining stockholders entitled to receive notice of, and vote at, the meeting or any postponement or adjournment.

At the meeting, shareholders will vote on electing four directors—Brian J. Gallagher, Ryan C. Larrenaga, Nancy T. Lukitsh, and Catherine James Paglia—to terms extending to the 2029 annual meeting, and on ratifying PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as independent auditor for the 2026 fiscal year. These governance decisions will shape the company’s board composition and audit oversight for the coming years, with full details to appear in the forthcoming proxy materials to be filed with regulators.

More about Tri-Continental Corp

Tri-Continental Corporation (NYSE: TY) is a publicly traded investment company managed by Columbia Management Investment Advisers, LLC and associated with the Columbia Threadneedle Investments brand. The firm offers investment products that carry market risk, including possible loss of principal and fluctuations in value, and targets investors who evaluate objectives, fees, and risks through its prospectus.

data.title: Cairn Homes CEO to Sell Stake in Accelerated Share Placing
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Cairn Homes ( (GB:CRN) ) has issued an update.

Cairn Homes has disclosed that chief executive Michael Stanley plans to sell up to 3.5 million shares in the company via an accelerated bookbuild arranged by Goodbody Stockbrokers. The sale represents about 0.6 per cent of the company’s issued share capital and would reduce his holding from roughly 2.4 per cent to about 1.8 per cent.

The placing, which is open to selected existing and new institutional investors, will determine final pricing and allocation at the discretion of Goodbody. Stanley has committed not to sell any further shares for six months after the transaction, a move likely intended to reassure investors about ongoing alignment between management and shareholders.

More about Cairn Homes

Cairn Homes plc is an Irish homebuilder focused on residential property development. The company operates primarily in Ireland, delivering new housing schemes and related residential projects to meet strong market demand in the domestic housing sector.

data.title: Standard Uranium Strikes Exploration Pact with Kineepik Métis Local
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Standard Uranium ( (TSE:STND) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Standard Uranium has signed an exploration agreement with Kineepik Métis Local Inc., formalizing a long-term partnership in the southeastern Athabasca Basin where its Rocas project lies within KML’s land and occupancy area. The accord recognizes KML’s Métis rights holders around Pinehouse, Saskatchewan, and is designed to align mineral exploration with local interests.

The agreement is intended to create meaningful employment, training, and business opportunities for KML citizens while giving them a leading role in environmental monitoring on their traditional lands. By committing to collaborative information-sharing and responsible exploration practices, Standard Uranium aims to advance its critical mineral projects in a way that supports community development and strengthens its social licence in a key uranium district.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:STND) stock is a Hold with a C$0.13 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Standard Uranium stock, see the TSE:STND Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on STND Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, STND is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and negative free cash flow), partially balanced by a debt-free balance sheet. Technicals are moderately supportive with the stock above major moving averages, while valuation is pressured by the lack of profitability and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on STND stock, click here.

More about Standard Uranium

Standard Uranium is a Canadian uranium exploration company and emerging project generator focused on the Athabasca Basin in Saskatchewan, one of the world’s premier uranium districts. The company controls more than 240,000 acres of prospective ground, including the Davidson River project in the southwest basin and several eastern basin properties targeting Athabasca-style, unconformity-related and basement-hosted uranium deposits.

data.title: Techstep Chairman Secures Significant Proxy Voting Power Ahead of March EGM
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Techstep ASA ( (DE:B1T0) ).

Techstep ASA has disclosed that its chairman of the board, Michael Jacobs, has received proxies without voting instructions for 4,277,128 shares ahead of the extraordinary general meeting scheduled for 23 March 2026. These proxies represent 12.43% of the company’s outstanding shares and votes, in addition to Jacobs’ own holding of 50,000 shares, or 0.15% of the share capital.

The concentration of voting power in the hands of the chairman for the EGM underscores his significant influence over the decisions to be taken at the meeting, even though the proxies automatically lapse once the EGM is concluded. The disclosure highlights Techstep’s adherence to Norwegian securities regulations on transparency in ownership and voting rights, providing investors with insight into the governance dynamics around the upcoming shareholder meeting.

More about Techstep ASA

Techstep ASA is a Norwegian company operating in the technology and mobility solutions segment, with its shares listed and regulated under the Norwegian Securities Trading Act. The company is governed by a board of directors and subject to standard disclosure obligations for listed entities in Norway.
